title: Plane Geometry
subject: Mathematics
learning_objectives: Identify acute, obtuse, and reflex angles.

key_vocabulary.definition: An angle measuring strictly less than 90 degrees.

content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Plane Geometry
Plane geometry focuses on 2D relationships between lines and angular junctions.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: What is the angle complementary to 35 degrees?
content.explanation: Complementary angles sum to 90 degrees. 90 - 35 = 55 degrees.
